rows.label: qev087705_MSG0001
rows.name: That's the last one. In your face![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0002
rows.name: I'll pass the news on to Ga Derg.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0003
rows.name: Victory is yours this day, my friends.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0004
rows.name: You remain, as ever, worthy opponents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0005
rows.name:
Warriors of Earth, the original
blame for this matter lies with us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0006
rows.name:
I will not forget the aid you have
provided to help us resolve it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_JNK0010
rows.name: Smile

rows.label: qev087705_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Ga Derg that's
what friends are for.

rows.label: qev087705_JNK0020
rows.name: Nod

rows.label: qev087705_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell Ga Derg they owe you
next time you're in trouble.

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0007
rows.name: And it wasn't really so difficult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0008
rows.name:
Even with machines as fine as yours, an
unskilled pilot can only do so much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0009
rows.name:
This was a breeze compared to fighting
against actual Larsian pilots.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0010
rows.name: Heh. You flatter us.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0011
rows.name:
Very well. Next time it will
be we who come to your aid.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0012
rows.name: We look forward to your time of crisis![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0013
rows.name: Then we can call it even.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0014
rows.name:
Hmph. The Larsians do not
enjoy living in debt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0015
rows.name:
May your moment of trouble come
swiftly and without remorse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087705_MSG0016
rows.name: Geez, some friend you are![ST:wait ]
